faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: A VPN creates an encrypted tunnel between your device and a server. All traffic passes through this tunnel, allowing you to bypass censorship and protect your data from interception.
faq.a2:
Android: Hiddify, v2rayNG
iOS: Hiddify, Streisand
Windows / macOS / Linux: Hiddify
The bot will automatically provide a connection link — just copy it into the app.
faq.q3: Does it work with Telegram, YouTube, Instagram?
faq.a3: Yes, NoBorder VPN provides access to all blocked services: Telegram, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X, ChatGPT, Spotify, and any other websites.
faq.a4: We accept bank cards (Visa, MasterCard), cryptocurrency (USDT, TON), and Telegram Stars. Everything happens right in the bot — fast and secure.
faq.a5: We do not store any activity logs. We use modern encryption protocols (VLESS Reality, Shadowsocks) that provide maximum traffic protection. Servers are located in reliable data centers.

jsonld.appDescription: Fast and reliable VPN to bypass censorship and access YouTube, Instagram, Telegram. Unlimited bandwidth, servers in 10+ countries.

faq.question: How does a VPN work?
faq.answer: A VPN creates an encrypted tunnel between your device and a server. All traffic passes through this tunnel, allowing you to bypass censorship and protect your data from interception.

faq.question: Which apps should I use?
faq.answer: Android: Hiddify, v2rayNG. iOS: Hiddify, Streisand. Windows / macOS / Linux: Hiddify. The bot will automatically provide a connection link — just copy it into the app.

faq.question: Does it work with Telegram, YouTube, Instagram?
faq.answer: Yes, NoBorder VPN provides access to all blocked services: Telegram, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X, ChatGPT, Spotify, and any other websites.

faq.question: How do I pay?
faq.answer: We accept bank cards (Visa, MasterCard), cryptocurrency (USDT, TON), and Telegram Stars. Everything happens right in the bot — fast and secure.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: We do not store any activity logs. We use modern encryption protocols (VLESS Reality, Shadowsocks) that provide maximum traffic protection. Servers are located in reliable data centers.
